description: Students who obtain consistently good results may be included on the Dean's Merit List, issued annually, in recognition of academic achievements.

criteria.general: To qualify for the Dean's Merit List in a particular year, a student must normally:

requirements.text: Have taken the equivalent of the following minimum NQF credits

standard_bsc_SB001.second_year: 120, including at least 96 senior course credits

edp_SB016.third_year: 120, including at least 96 senior course credits

requirements.text: Have passed all courses in the year
Have obtained a weighted average of 70% or above for the courses taken
Not have been found guilty of major academic misconduct in the year
